title: ilex dioica
intro: Ilex dioica, also known as the American Holly, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Aquifoliaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its berries, which are rich in vitamins A and C, and its leaves, which contain alkaloids that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ilex dioica include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Ilex dioica can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
